releases.label: All-Sky Release
releases.summary: WISE All-Sky Data Release from the cryogenic mission; superseded by AllWISE for most applications

releases.label: AllWISE
releases.summary: AllWISE Source Catalog — 747,634,026 objects detected on the coadded Atlas Images with positions, apparent motions, four-band fluxes and variability statistics; plus 42 billion multiepoch flux measurements and 18,240 calibrated 4-band Atlas images. Enhanced sensitivity and astrometry over the All-Sky release.

releases.label: NEOWISE-R Final Release
releases.summary: NEOWISE Reactivation Final Data Release covering 2013-12-13 to 2024-08-01, closing the series of annual W1/W2 releases issued yearly since 2015; time-domain photometry complementing the static AllWISE catalog
